optimization_analysis.optimized_query:
# Optimized Federated Query using SERVICE clauses
# Each triple pattern is pushed to its most selective endpoint

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8892/sparql/
# Predicates: 2
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/description> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drugs -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.9K triples]
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/description> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/vocab/resource/class/Offer -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.9K triples]

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8895/sparql/
# Predicates: 3
#   <http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#equation> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Reaction -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [7.8K triples]
#   <http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#xSubstrate> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Enzyme -> http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Compound) [8.4K triples]
#   <http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#xEnzyme> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Reaction -> http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Enzyme) [7.2K triples]
